summary: A rebroadcast TV news segment from 'The National News Desk' reporting on the arrest of an illegal alien charged in a deadly hit-and-run that killed a University of South Carolina student. It is a standard news package with an anchor reading copy, a mugshot, and family photos, not produced entertainment content.
notable_text: Lower-third: 'BORDER SECURITY / ILLEGAL ALIEN ARRESTED / CHARGED IN DEADLY HIT & RUN AT U. OF SOUTH CAROLINA'; 'THE NATIONAL NEWS DESK'; on-screen 'MIGRANT CRIME'.
